descriptionHints: A jewelry mould used to shape amulets during crafting recipes.
acquisitionHints: Direct stock data is sparse in the export, so treat this as a workshop tool surfaced through jewelry economy tables.
useHints: Used in amulet-making recipes that turn silver or gold bars into wearable jewelry.

descriptionHints: Standard currency used across shop and trade interactions.

descriptionHints: A low-value residue item associated with completed fires.
acquisitionHints: The export links ashes to Firemaking economy data, but the exact production step is not spelled out, so keep the wording conservative.
useHints: No major downstream crafting use is exported, so it mainly serves as a minor economy item.
